topic: 谢谢这本启蒙绘本‼️跟着大杏眼小白兔在菜园探险，3天认出100种植物生长秘密
script:
清晨，大杏眼小白兔背着小篮子，蹦进菜园。她长耳微卷，尾巴蓬松，粉鼻子一动一动：“今天，我们用3天认识植物的小秘密！”

第一天，她发现萝卜把胖胖身体藏在土里，青菜一层层长，像在叠绿裙子。第二天，番茄从小黄花变成红果果，豆角顺着竹竿往上爬，像在比赛爬高。第三天，南瓜躺在地上慢慢变圆，玉米悄悄扒开绿外套，露出金牙齿。

突然，下起小雨！小白兔赶紧给嫩苗盖叶子、扶正小苗。雨停了，菜园亮晶晶，100种植物都像在点头谢谢她。

小白兔眨眨发亮的大眼睛说：“原来每棵植物，都有自己的成长魔法！”妈妈笑着抱抱她：“会观察，就是最棒的启蒙呀。”

pages.text: 《谢谢这本启蒙绘本‼️跟着大杏眼小白兔在菜园探险，3天认出100种植物生长秘密》

pages.text: 清晨的菜园外景。8岁左右童真的大杏眼小白兔背着小篮子，蹦跳着进入菜园。她小巧轻盈，长耳微卷，尾巴蓬松，面颊淡粉，粉鼻子一动一动，停下脚步望向镜头说：“今天，我们用3天认识植物的小秘密！”阳光柔和，露珠闪亮。
pages.prompt:
A cute anthropomorphic little white rabbit girl, around 8 years old, childlike innocence, petite and light body, slightly curled long ears, fluffy tail, big almond eyes with catchlight, pink tiny nose and small mouth, faint pink cheeks, carrying a small basket, hopping into a vegetable garden at dawn, dew sparkling, soft morning sun, she stops and speaks happily to camera, storybook style, gentle pastoral atmosphere, cinematic framing, smooth tracking shot then slow push in, 4k, masterpiece, cinematic lighting, shallow depth of field, highly detailed fur, family picture book aesthetic

pages.shotDescription: 清晨的菜园外景。8岁左右童真的大杏眼小白兔背着小篮子，蹦跳着进入菜园。她小巧轻盈，长耳微卷，尾巴蓬松，面颊淡粉，粉鼻子一动一动，停下脚步望向镜头说：“今天，我们用3天认识植物的小秘密！”阳光柔和，露珠闪亮。

pages.text: 第一天的观察。小白兔蹲在菜畦边，先用小手拨开土面，看见胖胖的萝卜身体藏在土里；再转头看一旁的青菜一层层舒展，像叠起来的绿裙子。她睁大亮晶晶的眼睛，认真比较两种植物的生长方式。
pages.prompt:
The same consistent little white rabbit girl, 8 years old, petite, slightly curled long ears, fluffy tail, big glossy almond eyes, pink nose, small mouth, pale pink cheeks, crouching beside a garden bed on day one, gently parting the soil to discover a plump radish hidden underground, then looking at layered leafy greens growing like stacked green skirts, curious and observant expression, soft daylight, intimate educational picture book scene, low-angle shot with slight lateral move, macro-friendly garden detail, 4k, masterpiece, cinematic lighting, rich green colors, shallow depth of field

pages.shotDescription: 第一天的观察。小白兔蹲在菜畦边，先用小手拨开土面，看见胖胖的萝卜身体藏在土里；再转头看一旁的青菜一层层舒展，像叠起来的绿裙子。她睁大亮晶晶的眼睛，认真比较两种植物的生长方式。

pages.text: 第二天的变化。小白兔站在番茄架和豆角竹竿之间，一只手指向由小黄花变成的红番茄，另一只手比划豆角沿着竹竿向上爬。她开心地踮起脚，像在陪植物一起比赛爬高。
pages.prompt:
The same anthropomorphic little white rabbit girl, around 8 years old, petite and lively, slightly curled long ears, fluffy tail, bright almond eyes with highlights, pink nose and tiny mouth, standing between tomato vines and climbing beans on day two, pointing at small yellow tomato flowers turning into red tomatoes, gesturing to bean vines spiraling upward on bamboo poles as if racing to climb higher, playful tiptoe pose, bright garden morning, whimsical educational illustration style, slow circular camera move, 4k, masterpiece, cinematic lighting, crisp botanical detail, soft breeze

pages.shotDescription: 第二天的变化。小白兔站在番茄架和豆角竹竿之间，一只手指向由小黄花变成的红番茄，另一只手比划豆角沿着竹竿向上爬。她开心地踮起脚，像在陪植物一起比赛爬高。

pages.text: 第三天的发现。小白兔跪坐在地边，轻轻摸摸躺在地上慢慢变圆的南瓜，又凑近玉米，看到它悄悄扒开绿色外套，露出一排排金色颗粒。她眨眨大眼睛，露出惊喜的微笑。
pages.prompt:
Close view of the same little white rabbit girl, 8-year-old childlike character, petite body, slightly curled long ears, fluffy tail, big sparkling almond eyes, soft pink cheeks, pink tiny nose, kneeling beside a round pumpkin growing on the ground on day three, gently touching it, then leaning close to corn husks opening slightly to reveal golden kernels like tiny teeth, delighted blinking eyes and warm smile, lush garden textures, gentle natural light, slow push in, 4k, masterpiece, cinematic lighting, highly detailed vegetables, charming picture book mood

pages.shotDescription: 第三天的发现。小白兔跪坐在地边，轻轻摸摸躺在地上慢慢变圆的南瓜，又凑近玉米，看到它悄悄扒开绿色外套，露出一排排金色颗粒。她眨眨大眼睛，露出惊喜的微笑。

pages.text: 天气突变，小雨落下。小白兔立刻行动，张开小手给嫩苗盖上大叶子，又扶正被雨打歪的小苗。她的耳朵微微垂下却神情专注，雨滴在叶面上跳动，画面充满紧张但温柔的照料感。
pages.prompt:
The same little white rabbit girl, around 8 years old, petite and agile, slightly curled long ears dampened by rain, fluffy tail, big almond eyes with bright highlights, pink nose and tiny mouth, urgently helping seedlings during a sudden light rain in the garden, covering tender sprouts with broad leaves and straightening a bent young plant, focused caring expression, raindrops bouncing on leaves, soft gray rainy light, gentle emotional tension, handheld-style subtle follow shot, 4k, masterpiece, cinematic lighting, realistic water droplets, family picture book aesthetic

pages.shotDescription: 天气突变，小雨落下。小白兔立刻行动，张开小手给嫩苗盖上大叶子，又扶正被雨打歪的小苗。她的耳朵微微垂下却神情专注，雨滴在叶面上跳动，画面充满紧张但温柔的照料感。

pages.text: 雨后天晴，菜园亮晶晶。小白兔站在闪闪发亮的植物间，眨着发亮的大眼睛说：“原来每棵植物，都有自己的成长魔法！”妈妈走来笑着抱抱她，说：“会观察，就是最棒的启蒙呀。”周围繁茂的菜园仿佛都在点头致谢。
pages.prompt:
